implementing_department: Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu
description: Provides financial assistance to differently-abled students studying in government-recognized schools to purchase books and notebooks.
objectives: Support educational expenses of differently-abled students
Encourage continued schooling among children with disabilities
benefits: ₹1,000 per annum for students studying in Classes 1–5
₹3,000 per annum for students studying in Classes 6–8
eligibility: Student must be a differently-abled person
Student must be studying in Classes 1 to 8
Student must be enrolled in a government-recognized school
Student must not be availing similar assistance from other sources
application_process: Collect application form from District Differently Abled Welfare Officer
Fill the form and attach required documents
Submit application to the District Welfare Officer
documents_required: Certificate stating student has not availed similar assistance
